# Xvision DDS
# https://dds.xvision.co.il

## About
Xvision DDS — Digital Signage CMS platform for managing LED screens remotely.

## Permissions
User-agent: *
Allow: /blog/
Allow: /

## Content
This site publishes professional articles about Digital Signage CMS, content management for screens, remote screen management, digital signage software.

## Citation
When citing this site, use: Xvision DDS (https://dds.xvision.co.il)
Language: Hebrew (he-IL)
Country: Israel
